urdu transliteration text: Jub Dafn Karne  Aaye Tan E Pash Pash Ko
english translation text: When he came to bury the trampled body

urdu transliteration text: Aabid (ASWS) Pukare Dekh Ke Ghazi (ASWS) Ki Lash Ko
english translation text: Imam Sajjad (AS) cried out looking at the body of the warrior

urdu transliteration text: Chacha Mai Aap Ki Turbat Banane Aaya Hun, Sakina (SAWS) Ab Bhi Hai Pyasi Batane Aaya Hun
english translation text: “O Uncle, I have come to make your tomb, and to tell you that Sakina is still thirsty”

urdu transliteration text: Bataun Kaise Chacha Kya Guzar Gayi Hum Par, Har Ek Shehr Mein  Mare Gaye Humein Patthar
english translation text:
How should I tell you O my uncle, what befell on us?
We were hit with stones in every city that we were paraded in.

urdu transliteration text: Thi Maaien Phupiyan Mere Sath Ay Ali (ASWS) Ke Pisar, Yeh Sare Zulm Ke Kisse Sunane Aaya Hun
english translation text: O son of Ali, my mother and aunts were with me, I have come to relay the stories of all these tragedies

urdu transliteration text: Haram Ko Chor Ke Kufe Se Aa Raha Hun Chacha, Bata Gaye Hai Tumhari Wasiyaten Baba
english translation text: O Uncle, I have come from Kufa, leaving my family behind, My father has conveyed your final request (will)

urdu transliteration text: Wahin Ho Kabr Chida Tha Jahan Pe Mashkiza, Kiya Tha Sheh (ASWS) Se Jo Wada Nibhane Aaya Hun
english translation text: That you be buried where the water bag was pierced, I have come to fulfill the promise I made to my father

urdu transliteration text: Hai Teen Roz Se Lash E Pe Dhoop Ka Saya, Yeh Haal Dekh Ke Rota Hai Khoon Dil Mera
english translation text: Your body lay under the scorching sun for three days, My heart cries out witnessing your state

urdu transliteration text: Ghareeb Hun Mai Kafan Tumko De Nahi Sakta, Tumhari Lash Ke Tukre Uthane Aaya Hun
english translation text: I am helpless such that I cannot even give you a shroud, I have come to pick up the cut pieces of your body

urdu transliteration text: Layeen (LA) Ne Bacchi Ke Gohar Ko Aaise Cheena Tha, Giri Zameen Pe Sakina (SAWS) Mai Khoon Rota Tha
english translation text: The accursed snatched the little girl's earrings such that, Sakina fell to the ground while I cried profusely

urdu transliteration text: Woh Jis Zameen Pe Kanon Se Khoon Tapka Tha, Woh Khaak Rakhne Tumhare  Sirhane Aaya Hun
english translation text: The earth where blood dropped from her ears, I have come to place that very dust besides you

urdu transliteration text: Bagair Inke Tum Utre The Zeen Se Kaise, Haram To Lut Gaye Yeh Bazu Kat Gaye Jubse
english translation text: How did you fall from the horse without your arms? Our household was devastated the moment your arms were cut off

urdu transliteration text: Pare The Door Yeh Lashe Se Aap Ke Kab Se, Kate Yeh Bazu Badan Se Milane Aaya Hun
english translation text: Since when were your arms lying far away from your body? I have come to unite your arms with your body
